headline: Is Simon Property Group, Inc. (SPG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is SPG a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Simon Property Group, Inc. on Investing Lawyer’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on SPG. Simon Property Group, Inc.’s share was trading at $201.29 as of April 27th. SPG’s trailing and forward P/E were 14.21 and 29.59 respectively according […]
